creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
mikael@ suggests that we should investigate if we would benefit from applying this patch:

https://github.com/truenas/samba/commit/617e510a998d4c8f05d7eb60b09011f21b4e99bb

and reverting this one:

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=6a6678eefe429ff40c7521ccdb93b5c4196f570f

I'm opening a PR here so that we can track the progress together.
